family_intent: Test-currency guardian panel — ensure every midstream test carries dated provenance + currently-accurate skip reasons + CI-enforced audit so future agents can trust pytest output as evidence of current reality.

phase2_keep_legitimate.current_fact: paper-mode was removed in Phase2 (canonical-only execution); test validates deprecated paper-path behavior; retained as documentation antibody of removed contract

p9_canonical_event_shape_changed_pending.current_fact: reconcile/entry-path no longer emits POSITION_LIFECYCLE_UPDATED via log_trade_entry->position_events; canonical emission moved to build_entry_canonical_write + append_many_and_project post-T4.1b. Rescue semantics intact (in-memory pos mutation works) but canonical event shape is POSITION_OPEN_INTENT/ENTRY_ORDER_POSTED/ENTRY_ORDER_FILLED/EXIT_ORDER_FILLED (not the legacy POSITION_LIFECYCLE_UPDATED-with-source-field shape the tests expect).
p9_canonical_event_shape_changed_pending.deferred_to: T1.c-followup slice (rewrite against canonical event shape)

p4_contamination_guard_pending_relocatio.current_fact: _load_portfolio_from_json_data contamination guard path was deleted when canonical loader replaced JSON fallback. Current canonical loader is src/state/portfolio.py::load_portfolio guided by src/state/portfolio_loader_policy.py. Guard relocation deferred — requires audit of whether env-scoping is already implicit via SQL WHERE env=? predicates in the canonical loader, in which case these tests may be OBSOLETE rather than RELOCATE.
p4_contamination_guard_pending_relocatio.deferred_to: T1.c-followup slice (P4 guard relocation or OBSOLETE disposition)

t1_slices_closed.plan_acceptance_actual: --collect-only SKIPPED == 8 (1 Phase2 KEEP + 5 P9 pending-rewrite + 2 P4 pending-relocation)
t1_slices_closed.acceptance_gap_rationale: Plan text L164-168: 'T1.c rewrites surface latent production defects. Rewriting 7 as its own micro-slice; do not let surprises gate T1.c.' Surprise surfaced: reconcile event shape changed post-T4.1b; the 5 P9 tests were written against legacy POSITION_LIFECYCLE_UPDATED shape and need redesign. Per plan's explicit 'do not let surprises gate' clause, T1.c ships as audit-documented with honest skip reasons; rewrite work becomes T1.c-followup slice.

tests: test_chain_reconciliation_rescue_updates_trade_lifecycle_row (L268 — asserts canonical CHAIN_SYNCED event + POSITION_OPEN_INTENT/ENTRY_ORDER_POSTED baseline)
test_chain_reconciliation_rescue_emits_exactly_one_stage_event (L335 — canonical idempotency via phase check + already-logged guard)

p9_rewritten_and_passing.pattern: Shared _seed_canonical_entry_baseline(conn, pos) helper routes through build_entry_canonical_write + append_many_and_project to emit POSITION_OPEN_INTENT + ENTRY_ORDER_POSTED + (optionally) ENTRY_ORDER_FILLED so reconcile/check_pending_exits find the canonical baseline they now gate on.

p9_obsolete_pending_feature.current_fact_pre_closure: No canonical Day0 transition event existed. cycle_runtime monitor_refresh updated position_current.phase + trade_decisions via update_trade_lifecycle but did NOT emit a DAY0_WINDOW_ENTERED or similar canonical position_events row.
p9_obsolete_pending_feature.disposition_original: OBSOLETE_PENDING_FEATURE — restoring required a new build_day0_window_entered_canonical_write builder in src/engine/lifecycle_events.py. Feature-level architectural slice.
p9_obsolete_pending_feature.closure_details: Added build_day0_window_entered_canonical_write() in src/engine/lifecycle_events.py (single-event builder, sequence_no is caller-supplied). Added DAY0_WINDOW_ENTERED to position_events.event_type CHECK constraint in architecture/2026_04_02_architecture_kernel.sql. Added _ensure_day0_window_entered_event_type() legacy-DB migration in src/state/ledger.py that rebuilds the table with the expanded CHECK. Wired _emit_day0_window_entered_canonical_if_available() helper into src/engine/cycle_runtime.py at the day0 transition site (L625+). Rewrote the L875 test to assert the new canonical event type + phase_before/after + day0_entered_at payload. xfail / skip markers removed; test passes end-to-end via fresh-DB init_schema.

p4_obsolete_by_architecture.current_fact: src/state/portfolio.py::load_portfolio is now DB-first (query_portfolio_loader_view from canonical DB); env is carried on each row (portfolio.py:155 'env: str = "live"' axiom). JSON fallback + _load_portfolio_from_json_data contamination guard are deleted. The 'run loader in paper mode, expect RuntimeError on live position' scenario no longer exists in the DB-first canonical path.
p4_obsolete_by_architecture.disposition: OBSOLETE_BY_ARCHITECTURE — no RELOCATE target because env-filtering happens at the query layer per-row rather than at a single guard choke-point. Keep OBSOLETE with marker until operator decides delete-or-document-as-antibody-inventory.

remaining_skips_disposition: L589 Phase2 KEEP_LEGITIMATE (paper-mode removed; documentation antibody retained)

plan_acceptance_criterion_progress.gap_rationale: Remaining 3 skips cannot be cleared within T1.c-followup scope: 1 requires NEW feature (Day0 canonical event builder); 2 are OBSOLETE_BY_ARCHITECTURE (validate dead JSON path). Operator decision needed on whether to OBSOLETE_DELETE (physically remove the 3 tests) vs keep as documentation antibodies.
